name: Light Mashed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potatoes and salt in a medium, non-aluminum saucepan.
2. Add enough cool water to cover the potatoes.
3. Bring to a boil over high heat.
4. Reduce heat and simmer until the potatoes are tender when pierced with a fork (about 45 minutes).
5. Drain the potatoes, reserving a few tablespoons of cooking liquid. Alternatively, microwave the potatoes with a few tablespoons of water until tender and keep warm.
6. Simmer the cauliflower in milk (or microwave) until tender. Do not drain.
7. Mash together the drained potatoes and cauliflower with its cooking liquid. Add some potato water if necessary to achieve the desired consistency.
8. Add Butter Buds and pepper. Adjust salt to taste.
9. Makes about 4 servings (2/3 cup each).
